svg.aria-label: Map of the operations system: the data spine from materials to clients, the modules your answers switched on, and the estimate versus actual feedback loop.

g.text: estimate vs actual, fed back into rates and the next quote

a.data-note: Your priced inputs: every material (unit cost, vendor) and every labor operation (station, standard minutes, rate).
a.aria-label: Materials & labor (materials, labor_ops). Your priced inputs: every material (unit cost, vendor) and every labor operation (station, standard minutes, rate).

a.data-note: The bill of materials: binds a product to the materials it consumes.
a.aria-label: Recipes (bom_lines). The bill of materials: binds a product to the materials it consumes.

a.data-note: Your finished products. Each has many bom_lines and appears in quote_lines.
a.aria-label: Product catalog (products). Your finished products. Each has many bom_lines and appears in quote_lines.

a.data-note: Priced output of the engine, versioned; every line item is priced by the same engine.
a.aria-label: Quotes (quotes, quote_lines). Priced output of the engine, versioned; every line item is priced by the same engine.

a.data-note: A job from quote through delivery.
a.aria-label: Jobs (projects). A job from quote through delivery.

a.data-note: What the floor actually consumed, compared back to the estimate. The most valuable data you produce.
a.aria-label: Shop-floor actuals (production_actuals). What the floor actually consumed, compared back to the estimate. The most valuable data you produce.
